description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a streamlined fuselage painted primarily in blue and white. The aircraft features a low-wing configuration with straight wings and a conventional tail assembly, including a single vertical stabilizer. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy and appears to be positioned towards the front of the fuselage, likely accommodating one or two seats. The landing gear is of the tricycle type, with two main wheels under the wings and a nose wheel beneath the cockpit. Distinctive markings include a roundel insignia and 'NAVY' text on the fuselage, as well as a 'W' on the tail fin. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the overall design suggests a light utility or trainer aircraft suitable for short-range operations.
description: A small, blue and white single-propeller airplane with a low-wing design, tricycle landing gear, and an enclosed forward cockpit. Markings indicate naval use and the aircraft has a streamlined, conventional layout.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue and white fuselage, low-mounted straight wings, single propeller at the nose, and visible cockpit canopy with naval markings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, nose wheel, symmetrical wing span, and the streamlined cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the tail fin, 'W' marking, and rear fuselage details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail assembly, single vertical stabilizer, and the trailing edges of the wings and fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a clear canopy, likely single or tandem seating.
